entities.name: FIELD CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown in fields that are targets for insect pest resistance improvement

entities.name: INSECT PEST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand or resist attack by insect pests

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA, including all of its genes, within an organism

entities.name: MODERN BREEDING METHODS
entities.description: Advanced agricultural techniques used to improve crop traits and accelerate improvement

entities.name: GENETIC ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The underlying genetic basis and organization of a complex trait

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING METHODS
entities.description: Traditional methods of crop improvement based on phenotypic selection

entities.name: HIGH-YIELDING
entities.description: The characteristic of producing a high amount of agricultural output

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify specific locations on a chromosome for trait mapping

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Regions of the genome associated with a quantitative trait, such as insect resistance

entities.name: POSITIONAL CLONING
entities.description: A technique used to identify and isolate a gene based on its location in the genome

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: Technologies used to make precise changes to the DNA of an organism

entities.name: CRISPR/CAS9
entities.description: A specific genome editing tool used to tailor resistance loci

entities.name: DEFENSE MECHANISMS
entities.description: Biological responses and processes exerted by plants to counter insect pest attacks

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Insects that cause damage to field crops

entities.name: PLANTS
entities.description: The biological organisms that exhibit defense mechanisms against pests

entities.name: GENOMIC BREEDING STRATEGIES
entities.description: Breeding approaches that integrate genomic data to develop durable resistance

entities.name: GENETIC MAPPING
entities.description: The process of determining the relative locations of genes or markers on a chromosome

entities.name: INSECT PEST ATTACK
entities.description: The event of insect pests attacking a crop
